creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
<snip>	
 >> Description:
 > 	- Upgrade to 0.1.6;
 >
 > 	- Change WWW;
 >
 > 	- Add a regression-tests target.
 
 Can you change from 'regression-test:' to 'test:'? I like shorter and  
 easier to remember. :-)
 
 >> How-To-Repeat:
 > 	N/A
 >
 >> Fix:
 > 	Please apply the following patch, and bump PORTREVISION of vlc
 > 	and vlc-devel.
 
 ...and need to bump on net/vls too. I only see three ports depend on  
 libdvbpsi so far.
 
 If these work for you, you have my approve to commit it. Thanks!
 
 Cheers,
 Mezz
